columns.extraction_plan: Looked in: Chunk 5 (pages 1-2, "Findings" section), Chunk 7 (pages 4-6, "Results" section), Table 2 (Chunk 3, page 9), Table 3 (Chunk 4, page 11). The text on page 7 (Chunk 7) states: "Overall, the median abiraterone treatment duration before discontinuation was 33.2 months (95% CI 25.5–43·2) in the ADT without docetaxel population and 34.1 months (30.0–43.5) in the ADT with docetaxel population." These values are for subgroups, not the entire treatment arm.

Looked in: Chunk 5 (pages 1-2, "Findings" section), Chunk 7 (pages 4-6, "Results" section), Chunk 6 (pages 2-4, "Procedures" section), Table 2 (Chunk 3, page 9), Table 3 (Chunk 4, page 11). The "Procedures" section (page 3, Chunk 6) mentions that ADT was planned to be continuously maintained and docetaxel was planned for six cycles (approximately 4.5 months), but the actual median duration of these treatments before discontinuation for the control arm is not provided.
